Engineering Manuals // Blueprints

Blueprints Reference Manual

Series Engineering Updated 2026-06-25
Briefing

Every engineering blueprint in the galaxy — all grades, materials, engineers and experimental effects

Pure reference, no profile tracking: 185 blueprint cards across 43 module types, each folding open to a per-grade material breakdown, the engineers who offer it, and its experimental effects. Search from the header, or browse the categories below — every card is folded by default.

185
Blueprint cards
43
Module types
G1–G5
Grades per blueprint
3
Material categories
01

What Blueprints Are

A blueprint is an engineering modification you roll onto a module — a longer-jumping FSD, a harder-hitting weapon, tougher armour. Each runs from Grade 1 to Grade 5, with stronger effects at higher grades, and is offered by specific engineers. Rolling a grade consumes materials (raw, manufactured or encoded); once a modification is applied you can also spend materials on a single experimental effect for an extra edge.

Each card below names the blueprint, what it does and who it's for, then lists the materials per grade (with the engineers offering that grade) and every experimental effect. Click a card to fold it open, or use the header search to jump straight to one.

On the roll counts

Coriolis-data stores the per-roll material cost of each grade but not how many rolls a grade takes — that depends on engineer reputation and luck. The Avg Rolls and Total columns use community-standard indicative figures (Inara / EDEngineer), cross-checked against the Engineering Tracker. Treat them as planning estimates — Per Roll is the one authoritative figure. Experimental effects always cost their materials once (Avg Rolls = 1).

02

Core Internals

The mandatory spine of every hull — power, motion, jump, survival.

Bulkheads 5 blueprints
▶ Blast Resistant Bulkheads
Balanced bulkhead upgrade — modest resistance across all damage types with low mass cost.
★ CombatHull resistances
⚙ What it does

Applies this blueprint's standard modifier curve from grade 1 to 5.

★ Who it's for

Fit where this module's role benefits; see the per-grade materials below.

⚡ Experimental pick

Deep Plating adds raw hull on top of the resistance blueprint — the standard hull-tank experimental.

▶ Heavy Duty Bulkheads
Thickens the ship's bulkheads for raw hull integrity, paid for in mass.
★ CombatHull resistances
⚙ What it does

Reactive bulkhead upgrade that multiplies base hull integrity. The foundation of any hull tank.

★ Who it's for

Combat hulls expecting to take sustained fire.

⚡ Experimental pick

Deep Plating adds raw hull on top of the resistance blueprint — the standard hull-tank experimental.

Frame Shift Drive 3 blueprints
▶ Faster Boot Sequence Frame Shift Drive
Slashes FSD boot/charge time so you can jump or escape sooner.
★ CombatFast escapesJump-chaining
⚙ What it does

Cuts FSD boot and charge time so jumps and high-waking escapes happen sooner.

★ Who it's for

Combat ships that need fast escapes and explorers chaining jumps.

⚡ Experimental pick

Mass Manager is the default for size 5+ drives (more optimised mass per the same blueprint); Deep Charge edges ahead only at size 4 and below.

▶ Increased Range Frame Shift Drive
Boosts the FSD's optimised mass, raising jump range at the cost of a little integrity and heat.
All ships★ ExplorationLong-range travel
⚙ What it does

Raises the FSD optimised mass, which is the single biggest lever on jump range. G5 with a Guardian FSD Booster is the galaxy-standard range stack.

★ Who it's for

Every hull benefits; mandatory on dedicated explorers and a strong quality-of-life pick on any combat or trade ship that travels far.

⚡ Experimental pick

Mass Manager is the default for size 5+ drives (more optimised mass per the same blueprint); Deep Charge edges ahead only at size 4 and below.

▶ Shielded Frame Shift Drive
Hardens the FSD against damage and malfunction, trading a little integrity.
All shipsReliability
⚙ What it does

Hardens the module against malfunction and trims its power draw at a small integrity cost.

★ Who it's for

Any build that values reliability; cheap insurance on a frequently-targeted module.

⚡ Experimental pick

Mass Manager is the default for size 5+ drives (more optimised mass per the same blueprint); Deep Charge edges ahead only at size 4 and below.

Life Support 3 blueprints
▶ Lightweight Life Support
Strips mass from life support to claw back jump range.
★ ExplorationMass-saving
⚙ What it does

Strips module mass to recover jump range, with a small trade-off on the module's primary stat.

★ Who it's for

Explorers and any range-sensitive build; least useful on dedicated combat hulls where mass matters little.

⚡ Experimental pick

Life Support has no experimental effects — none are available in-game.

▶ Reinforced Life Support
Hardens life support against damage so your oxygen survives a canopy breach.
★ CombatCanopy survivability
⚙ What it does

Hardens the module against damage at the cost of added mass — keeps it working under fire.

★ Who it's for

Combat and Thargoid builds where module survival matters more than weight.

⚡ Experimental pick

Life Support has no experimental effects — none are available in-game.

Power Distributor 6 blueprints
▶ Charge Enhanced Power Distributor
Speeds up capacitor recharge across all three pips — the combat distributor standard.
★ CombatMiningSustained fire
⚙ What it does

Faster capacitor recharge on all three pips. Keeps weapons firing and boosts coming without dead time — the combat standard, often with Cluster Capacitor.

★ Who it's for

All combat ships and mining lances that need weapons firing and boosts ready without dead time.

⚡ Experimental pick

Cluster Capacitor (capacity) pairs with Charge Enhanced for combat; Stripped Down suits travel/explorer distributors.

Power Plant 3 blueprints
▶ Armoured Power Plant
Adds raw power output plus heavy integrity and heat reduction — the durable default.
★ MultipurposeReliability · non-combat
⚙ What it does

The all-round default: more output, much higher module integrity, and a meaningful heat cut. Survives a power-plant sniping better than any other blueprint.

★ Who it's for

Non-combat ships of every kind — explorers, haulers and miners — and any build that values reliability over peak output.

⚡ Experimental pick

Thermal Spread is the broadly optimal pick for combat power plants — it bleeds heat and pairs perfectly with Overcharged.

Maximises power output to feed hungry loadouts, paid for in integrity and heat.

Maximum output to feed power-hungry weapon and shield stacks. Costs integrity and runs hot, so pair with Thermal Spread.

Combat ships that need every megawatt — RES/CZ gunboats, interceptors and shield-heavy brawlers. The go-to combat power plant.

▶ Lightweight Sensors

Any explorer build, where shaving sensor mass buys extra jump range.

Thrusters 3 blueprints
▶ Clean Drive Tuning Thrusters
Balances speed gains with reduced power draw and heat — the efficient travel tune.
★ ExplorationEfficient travel
⚙ What it does

A gentler tune that lifts speed while cutting power draw and heat. Less raw speed than Dirty but easier on the power budget.

★ Who it's for

Travel and multipurpose ships on a tight power budget, or cold-running stealth builds where heat matters more than peak speed.

⚡ Experimental pick

Drag Drives adds manoeuvrability on top of Dirty's speed for combat; Drive Distributors suits travel.

▶ Drive Strengthening Thrusters
Reinforces thrusters for durability and mass tolerance, sacrificing some performance.
★ Trading & haulingHeavy-ship mobility
⚙ What it does

Reinforces the thrusters for higher integrity and mass tolerance — keeps big, heavy ships moving when overweight.

★ Who it's for

Heavy haulers and overweight builds that prioritise staying mobile over top speed.

⚡ Experimental pick

Drag Drives adds manoeuvrability on top of Dirty's speed for combat; Drive Distributors suits travel.

Optional Internals

Defence, capacity, and utility modules fitted to internal slots.

Auto Field-Maintenance Unit 1 blueprint
▶ Shielded Auto Field-Maintenance Unit
Hardens the AFMU against malfunction and trims its power draw, at a small integrity cost.
★ ExplorationSelf-repair
⚙ What it does

Hardens the module against malfunction and trims its power draw at a small integrity cost.

★ Who it's for

Any build that values reliability; cheap insurance on a frequently-targeted module.

⚡ Experimental pick

AFMU experimentals are minor; pick to match your repair-uptime needs.

Bi-Weave Shield Generator 4 blueprints
▶ Enhanced, Low Power Bi-Weave Shield Generator
Cuts shield mass, power and heat for light, efficient coverage.
★ MultipurposeLight shield
⚙ What it does

Enhanced, Low Power: a much lighter, cooler, cheaper-to-run shield with a smaller buffer. Pair with Lo-Draw or Stripped Down.

★ Who it's for

Explorers and haulers that want a get-home shield without the mass and power hit.

⚡ Experimental pick

Thermo Block layers thermal resistance onto the fast-regen Bi-Weave; Fast Charge leans further into its recovery identity.

▶ Kinetic Resistant Bi-Weave Shield Generator
Tilts the generator toward kinetic resistance.
★ CombatAnti-kinetic
⚙ What it does

Bakes broad kinetic resistance into the generator itself, layering with boosters for huge effective HP versus projectile weapons.

★ Who it's for

Anti-PvP and anti-NPC kinetic builds on dedicated combat hulls.

⚡ Experimental pick

Thermo Block layers thermal resistance onto the fast-regen Bi-Weave; Fast Charge leans further into its recovery identity.

Maximises raw shield strength — the buffer-tank standard for big shields.
★ CombatBig shield buffer

Collector Limpet Controller 3 blueprints
▶ Lightweight Collector Limpet Controller
Strips mass from the collector controller to free up jump range.
★ MiningCollector limpets
⚙ What it does

Strips module mass to recover jump range, with a small trade-off on the module's primary stat.

★ Who it's for

Explorers and any range-sensitive build; least useful on dedicated combat hulls where mass matters little.

⚡ Experimental pick

Limpet controllers rarely justify an experimental beyond the lightweight/shielded blueprint itself.

Limpet controllers rarely justify an experimental beyond the lightweight/shielded blueprint itself.

Prismatic Shield Generator 4 blueprints
▶ Enhanced, Low Power Prismatic Shield Generator
Cuts shield mass, power and heat for light, efficient coverage.
★ MultipurposeLight shield
⚙ What it does

Enhanced, Low Power: a much lighter, cooler, cheaper-to-run shield with a smaller buffer. Pair with Lo-Draw or Stripped Down.

★ Who it's for

Explorers and haulers that want a get-home shield without the mass and power hit.

⚡ Experimental pick

Thermo Block is the PvP-grade thermal pick on the strongest base shield in the game.

Anti-PvP and anti-NPC kinetic builds on dedicated combat hulls.

Thermo Block is the PvP-grade thermal pick on the strongest base shield in the game.

Prospector Limpet Controller 3 blueprints
▶ Lightweight Prospector Limpet Controller
Strips mass from the prospector controller to protect jump range.
★ MiningProspector limpets
⚙ What it does

Strips module mass to recover jump range, with a small trade-off on the module's primary stat.

★ Who it's for

Explorers and any range-sensitive build; least useful on dedicated combat hulls where mass matters little.

⚡ Experimental pick

Limpet controllers rarely justify an experimental beyond the lightweight/shielded blueprint itself.

★ MiningRefining
⚙ What it does

Hardens the module against malfunction and trims its power draw at a small integrity cost.

★ Who it's for

Any build that values reliability; cheap insurance on a frequently-targeted module.

⚡ Experimental pick

Refinery experimentals are minimal; the shielded blueprint is the substance.

Shield Generator 4 blueprints
▶ Enhanced, Low Power Shield Generator
Cuts shield mass, power and heat for light, efficient coverage.
★ MultipurposeLight shield
⚙ What it does

Enhanced, Low Power: a much lighter, cooler, cheaper-to-run shield with a smaller buffer. Pair with Lo-Draw or Stripped Down.

★ Who it's for

Explorers and haulers that want a get-home shield without the mass and power hit.

⚡ Experimental pick

Thermo Block (thermal resistance) is the anti-NPC default; Lo-Draw or Stripped Down suit efficient explorer shields.

▶ Kinetic Resistant Shield Generator
Tilts the generator toward kinetic resistance.
★ CombatAnti-kinetic
⚙ What it does

Bakes broad kinetic resistance into the generator itself, layering with boosters for huge effective HP versus projectile weapons.

★ Who it's for

Anti-PvP and anti-NPC kinetic builds on dedicated combat hulls.

⚡ Experimental pick

Thermo Block (thermal resistance) is the anti-NPC default; Lo-Draw or Stripped Down suit efficient explorer shields.

▶ Reinforced Shield Generator
Maximises raw shield strength — the buffer-tank standard for big shields.
★ CombatBig shield buffer
⚙ What it does

Largest raw shield buffer of the three blueprints. The classic big-shield tank, strong with Hi-Cap or Thermo Block.

★ Who it's for

Combat ships that brawl in RES/CZ and any build that wants a deep shield buffer.

⚡ Experimental pick

Thermo Block (thermal resistance) is the anti-NPC default; Lo-Draw or Stripped Down suit efficient explorer shields.

05

Hardpoints — Weapons

Every weapon blueprint, listed once per weapon type it applies to.

Advanced Missile Rack 4 blueprints
▶ High Capacity Magazine Advanced Missile Rack
Enlarges the magazine and ammo reserve for long engagements.
★ CombatLong engagements
⚙ What it does

A bigger magazine and ammo reserve for sustained engagements without reloading or rearming.

★ Who it's for

Massacre stacking and long RES sessions where ammo economy matters.

⚡ Experimental pick

Same as the missile rack — Drag Munitions for control, penetrator specials for big hulls.

Strips weapon mass and power draw for light, agile fits.
★ CombatLight · small ships
⚙ What it does

Strips weapon mass and power for light, agile or power-starved fits.

★ Who it's for

Small ships and explorers carrying token defensive weapons.

Same as the missile rack — Drag Munitions for control, penetrator specials for big hulls.

▶ Rapid Fire Advanced Missile Rack
Raises rate of fire and cuts jam chance for a higher damage stream.
★ CombatSustained fire
⚙ What it does

Raises fire rate and cuts jam chance for a denser damage stream and smoother feel.

★ Who it's for

Fragment cannons, multi-cannons and burst lasers where a higher rate of fire compounds DPS.

⚡ Experimental pick

Same as the missile rack — Drag Munitions for control, penetrator specials for big hulls.

Hardens the weapon against damage and adds armour piercing.

Hardens the weapon against damage and adds piercing — keeps hardpoints alive under return fire.

★ Who it's for

Durability-focused turret boats and long sieges.

Same as the missile rack — Drag Munitions for control, penetrator specials for big hulls.

Advanced Multi-Cannon 8 blueprints
▶ Efficient Advanced Multi-Cannon
Cuts power and heat per shot for sustained fire with minimal damage loss.
★ CombatPower / heat-limited
⚙ What it does

Cuts power draw and heat per shot for next to no damage loss — lets a ship mount more or bigger weapons within its power budget.

★ Who it's for

Power- or heat-limited builds, beam-laser boats, and any fit fighting the distributor.

⚡ Experimental pick

Same house rule as the multi-cannon: one Corrosive Shell per ship, Auto Loader on the rest.

▶ Long Range Advanced Multi-Cannon
Extends weapon range and removes damage falloff out to distance.
★ CombatSniping · stand-off
⚙ What it does

Flattens damage falloff so you hit for full at range. Essential for rail guns, plasma and any sniping playstyle.

★ Who it's for

Snipers and stand-off builds, rail/plasma gunboats, and PvE pilots who like to open early.

⚡ Experimental pick

Same house rule as the multi-cannon: one Corrosive Shell per ship, Auto Loader on the rest.

▶ Overcharged Advanced Multi-Cannon
Pushes multi-cannon damage hard at the cost of distributor draw and a smaller clip.
★ CombatMax DPS · RES / CZ
⚙ What it does

The multi-cannon damage king. Biggest raw uplift, paid for in distributor draw and a smaller clip — counter with Auto Loader on every barrel.

★ Who it's for

The default multi-cannon mod for any gunboat running fixed or gimballed multi-cannons.

⚡ Experimental pick

Same house rule as the multi-cannon: one Corrosive Shell per ship, Auto Loader on the rest.

▶ Rapid Fire Advanced Multi-Cannon
Raises rate of fire and cuts jam chance for a higher damage stream.
★ CombatSustained fire
⚙ What it does

Raises fire rate and cuts jam chance for a denser damage stream and smoother feel.

★ Who it's for

Fragment cannons, multi-cannons and burst lasers where a higher rate of fire compounds DPS.

⚡ Experimental pick

Same house rule as the multi-cannon: one Corrosive Shell per ship, Auto Loader on the rest.

Durability-focused turret boats and long sieges.

Beam Laser 6 blueprints
▶ Efficient Beam Laser
Cuts power and heat per shot for sustained fire with minimal damage loss.
★ CombatPower / heat-limited
⚙ What it does

Cuts power draw and heat per shot for next to no damage loss — lets a ship mount more or bigger weapons within its power budget.

★ Who it's for

Power- or heat-limited builds, beam-laser boats, and any fit fighting the distributor.

⚡ Experimental pick

Thermal Vent is the signature beam experimental — vents heat on hit, enabling cold-running laser boats.

▶ Long Range Beam Laser
Extends weapon range and removes damage falloff out to distance.
★ CombatSniping · stand-off
⚙ What it does

Flattens damage falloff so you hit for full at range. Essential for rail guns, plasma and any sniping playstyle.

★ Who it's for

Snipers and stand-off builds, rail/plasma gunboats, and PvE pilots who like to open early.

⚡ Experimental pick

Thermal Vent is the signature beam experimental — vents heat on hit, enabling cold-running laser boats.

▶ Sturdy Beam Laser
Hardens the weapon against damage and adds armour piercing.
★ CombatDurable hardpoints
⚙ What it does

Hardens the weapon against damage and adds piercing — keeps hardpoints alive under return fire.

★ Who it's for

Durability-focused turret boats and long sieges.

⚡ Experimental pick

Thermal Vent is the signature beam experimental — vents heat on hit, enabling cold-running laser boats.

Burst Laser 8 blueprints
▶ Efficient Burst Laser
Cuts power and heat per shot for sustained fire with minimal damage loss.
★ CombatPower / heat-limited
⚙ What it does

Cuts power draw and heat per shot for next to no damage loss — lets a ship mount more or bigger weapons within its power budget.

★ Who it's for

Power- or heat-limited builds, beam-laser boats, and any fit fighting the distributor.

⚡ Experimental pick

Thermal Shock or Scramble Spectrum suit burst lasers; rate-of-fire compounds their DPS.

▶ Long Range Burst Laser
Extends weapon range and removes damage falloff out to distance.
★ CombatSniping · stand-off
⚙ What it does

Flattens damage falloff so you hit for full at range. Essential for rail guns, plasma and any sniping playstyle.

★ Who it's for

Snipers and stand-off builds, rail/plasma gunboats, and PvE pilots who like to open early.

⚡ Experimental pick

Thermal Shock or Scramble Spectrum suit burst lasers; rate-of-fire compounds their DPS.

Pushes weapon damage hard at the cost of distributor draw and a smaller clip.
★ CombatMax DPS · RES / CZ
⚙ What it does

The damage-per-shot king. Biggest raw uplift of any weapon blueprint, paid for in distributor draw and clip size — counter the clip with Auto Loader.

★ Who it's for

The primary combat weapon blueprint — any RES/CZ gunboat or PvP build.

⚡ Experimental pick

Thermal Shock or Scramble Spectrum suit burst lasers; rate-of-fire compounds their DPS.

▶ Sturdy Burst Laser
Hardens the weapon against damage and adds armour piercing.
★ CombatDurable hardpoints
⚙ What it does

Hardens the weapon against damage and adds piercing — keeps hardpoints alive under return fire.

★ Who it's for

Durability-focused turret boats and long sieges.

⚡ Experimental pick

Thermal Shock or Scramble Spectrum suit burst lasers; rate-of-fire compounds their DPS.

Cannon 8 blueprints
▶ Efficient Cannon
Cuts power and heat per shot for sustained fire with minimal damage loss.
★ CombatPower / heat-limited
⚙ What it does

Cuts power draw and heat per shot for next to no damage loss — lets a ship mount more or bigger weapons within its power budget.

★ Who it's for

Power- or heat-limited builds, beam-laser boats, and any fit fighting the distributor.

⚡ Experimental pick

Force Shell knocks targets off course; Auto Loader keeps cannons firing without reload gaps.

▶ Long Range Cannon
Extends weapon range and removes damage falloff out to distance.
★ CombatSniping · stand-off
⚙ What it does

Flattens damage falloff so you hit for full at range. Essential for rail guns, plasma and any sniping playstyle.

★ Who it's for

Snipers and stand-off builds, rail/plasma gunboats, and PvE pilots who like to open early.

⚡ Experimental pick

Force Shell knocks targets off course; Auto Loader keeps cannons firing without reload gaps.

The damage-per-shot king. Biggest raw uplift of any weapon blueprint, paid for in distributor draw and clip size — counter the clip with Auto Loader.

The primary combat weapon blueprint — any RES/CZ gunboat or PvP build.

Force Shell knocks targets off course; Auto Loader keeps cannons firing without reload gaps.

★ CombatDurable hardpoints

Hardens the weapon against damage and adds piercing — keeps hardpoints alive under return fire.

★ Who it's for

Durability-focused turret boats and long sieges.

⚡ Experimental pick

Force Shell knocks targets off course; Auto Loader keeps cannons firing without reload gaps.

Fragment Cannon 7 blueprints
▶ Double Shot Fragment Cannon
Fires two shells per trigger pull — burst damage at a heavier draw.
★ CombatBurst · alpha
⚙ What it does

Fires two shells per pull for burst damage, at a heavier draw and faster ammo burn.

★ Who it's for

Fragment cannon alpha-strike builds.

⚡ Experimental pick

Screening Shell or Drag Munitions on frags; Double Shot builds favour rate-of-fire experimentals.

▶ Efficient Fragment Cannon
Cuts power and heat per shot for sustained fire with minimal damage loss.
★ CombatPower / heat-limited
⚙ What it does

Cuts power draw and heat per shot for next to no damage loss — lets a ship mount more or bigger weapons within its power budget.

★ Who it's for

Power- or heat-limited builds, beam-laser boats, and any fit fighting the distributor.

⚡ Experimental pick

Screening Shell or Drag Munitions on frags; Double Shot builds favour rate-of-fire experimentals.

▶ Overcharged Fragment Cannon
Pushes weapon damage hard at the cost of distributor draw and a smaller clip.
★ CombatMax DPS · RES / CZ
⚙ What it does

The damage-per-shot king. Biggest raw uplift of any weapon blueprint, paid for in distributor draw and clip size — counter the clip with Auto Loader.

★ Who it's for

The primary combat weapon blueprint — any RES/CZ gunboat or PvP build.

⚡ Experimental pick

Screening Shell or Drag Munitions on frags; Double Shot builds favour rate-of-fire experimentals.

Raises rate of fire and cuts jam chance for a higher damage stream.
★ CombatSustained fire
⚙ What it does

Raises fire rate and cuts jam chance for a denser damage stream and smoother feel.

★ Who it's for

Fragment cannons, multi-cannons and burst lasers where a higher rate of fire compounds DPS.

Mine experimentals are niche; choose to match the mine type and your area-denial plan.

Multi-Cannon 8 blueprints
▶ Efficient Multi-Cannon
Cuts power and heat per shot for sustained fire with minimal damage loss.
★ CombatPower / heat-limited
⚙ What it does

Cuts power draw and heat per shot for next to no damage loss — lets a ship mount more or bigger weapons within its power budget.

★ Who it's for

Power- or heat-limited builds, beam-laser boats, and any fit fighting the distributor.

⚡ Experimental pick

House rule: one Corrosive Shell per ship (debuffs the target for every weapon), Auto Loader on every other barrel to erase reload gaps.

▶ High Capacity Magazine Multi-Cannon
Enlarges the magazine and ammo reserve for long engagements.
★ CombatLong engagements
⚙ What it does

A bigger magazine and ammo reserve for sustained engagements without reloading or rearming.

★ Who it's for

Massacre stacking and long RES sessions where ammo economy matters.

⚡ Experimental pick

House rule: one Corrosive Shell per ship (debuffs the target for every weapon), Auto Loader on every other barrel to erase reload gaps.

▶ Long Range Multi-Cannon
Extends weapon range and removes damage falloff out to distance.
★ CombatSniping · stand-off
⚙ What it does

Flattens damage falloff so you hit for full at range. Essential for rail guns, plasma and any sniping playstyle.

★ Who it's for

Snipers and stand-off builds, rail/plasma gunboats, and PvE pilots who like to open early.

⚡ Experimental pick

House rule: one Corrosive Shell per ship (debuffs the target for every weapon), Auto Loader on every other barrel to erase reload gaps.

▶ Overcharged Multi-Cannon
Pushes multi-cannon damage hard at the cost of distributor draw and a smaller clip.
★ CombatMax DPS · RES / CZ
⚙ What it does

The multi-cannon damage king. Biggest raw uplift, paid for in distributor draw and a smaller clip — counter with Auto Loader on every barrel.

★ Who it's for

The default multi-cannon mod for any gunboat running fixed or gimballed multi-cannons.

⚡ Experimental pick

House rule: one Corrosive Shell per ship (debuffs the target for every weapon), Auto Loader on every other barrel to erase reload gaps.

▶ Rapid Fire Multi-Cannon
Raises rate of fire and cuts jam chance for a higher damage stream.
★ CombatSustained fire
⚙ What it does

Raises fire rate and cuts jam chance for a denser damage stream and smoother feel.

★ Who it's for

Fragment cannons, multi-cannons and burst lasers where a higher rate of fire compounds DPS.

⚡ Experimental pick

House rule: one Corrosive Shell per ship (debuffs the target for every weapon), Auto Loader on every other barrel to erase reload gaps.

▶ Short Range Multi-Cannon
Trades range for a large up-close damage boost.
★ CombatBrawling
⚙ What it does

Trades range for a big up-close damage boost. Brutal in a brawl, useless at distance.

★ Who it's for

In-your-face brawlers — fragment-cannon Cobras and shotgunning gunboats.

⚡ Experimental pick

House rule: one Corrosive Shell per ship (debuffs the target for every weapon), Auto Loader on every other barrel to erase reload gaps.

▶ Sturdy Multi-Cannon
Hardens the weapon against damage and adds armour piercing.
★ CombatDurable hardpoints
⚙ What it does

Hardens the weapon against damage and adds piercing — keeps hardpoints alive under return fire.

★ Who it's for

Durability-focused turret boats and long sieges.

⚡ Experimental pick

House rule: one Corrosive Shell per ship (debuffs the target for every weapon), Auto Loader on every other barrel to erase reload gaps.

Plasma Accelerator 8 blueprints
▶ Efficient Plasma Accelerator
Cuts power and heat per shot for sustained fire with minimal damage loss.
★ CombatPower / heat-limited
⚙ What it does

Cuts power draw and heat per shot for next to no damage loss — lets a ship mount more or bigger weapons within its power budget.

★ Who it's for

Power- or heat-limited builds, beam-laser boats, and any fit fighting the distributor.

⚡ Experimental pick

Plasma Slug (refuels ammo from your fuel) or Dispersal Field define the plasma meta; pair with Long Range.

▶ Focused Plasma Accelerator
Tightens the weapon for longer range and armour piercing.
★ CombatArmour piercing
⚙ What it does

Tightens the weapon for extra range and armour piercing — gets full damage through heavy hulls.

★ Who it's for

Piercing-limited weapons against large, heavily-armoured targets.

⚡ Experimental pick

Plasma Slug (refuels ammo from your fuel) or Dispersal Field define the plasma meta; pair with Long Range.

▶ Long Range Plasma Accelerator
Extends weapon range and removes damage falloff out to distance.
★ CombatSniping · stand-off
⚙ What it does

Flattens damage falloff so you hit for full at range. Essential for rail guns, plasma and any sniping playstyle.

★ Who it's for

Snipers and stand-off builds, rail/plasma gunboats, and PvE pilots who like to open early.

⚡ Experimental pick

Plasma Slug (refuels ammo from your fuel) or Dispersal Field define the plasma meta; pair with Long Range.

▶ Overcharged Plasma Accelerator
Pushes weapon damage hard at the cost of distributor draw and a smaller clip.
★ CombatMax DPS · RES / CZ
⚙ What it does

The damage-per-shot king. Biggest raw uplift of any weapon blueprint, paid for in distributor draw and clip size — counter the clip with Auto Loader.

★ Who it's for

The primary combat weapon blueprint — any RES/CZ gunboat or PvP build.

⚡ Experimental pick

Plasma Slug (refuels ammo from your fuel) or Dispersal Field define the plasma meta; pair with Long Range.

⚙ What it does

Raises fire rate and cuts jam chance for a denser damage stream and smoother feel.

★ Who it's for

Fragment cannons, multi-cannons and burst lasers where a higher rate of fire compounds DPS.

⚡ Experimental pick

Plasma Slug (refuels ammo from your fuel) or Dispersal Field define the plasma meta; pair with Long Range.

▶ Short Range Plasma Accelerator
Trades range for a large up-close damage boost.
★ CombatBrawling
⚙ What it does

Trades range for a big up-close damage boost. Brutal in a brawl, useless at distance.

★ Who it's for

In-your-face brawlers — fragment-cannon Cobras and shotgunning gunboats.

⚡ Experimental pick

Plasma Slug (refuels ammo from your fuel) or Dispersal Field define the plasma meta; pair with Long Range.

Hardens the weapon against damage and adds armour piercing.
★ CombatDurable hardpoints
⚙ What it does

Hardens the weapon against damage and adds piercing — keeps hardpoints alive under return fire.

Pulse Laser 8 blueprints
▶ Efficient Pulse Laser
Cuts power and heat per shot for sustained fire with minimal damage loss.
★ CombatPower / heat-limited
⚙ What it does

Cuts power draw and heat per shot for next to no damage loss — lets a ship mount more or bigger weapons within its power budget.

★ Who it's for

Power- or heat-limited builds, beam-laser boats, and any fit fighting the distributor.

⚡ Experimental pick

Phasing Sequence (bypasses some shield) or Scramble Spectrum are the pulse-laser staples.

▶ Focused Pulse Laser
Tightens the weapon for longer range and armour piercing.
★ CombatArmour piercing
⚙ What it does

Tightens the weapon for extra range and armour piercing — gets full damage through heavy hulls.

★ Who it's for

Piercing-limited weapons against large, heavily-armoured targets.

⚡ Experimental pick

Phasing Sequence (bypasses some shield) or Scramble Spectrum are the pulse-laser staples.

▶ Long Range Pulse Laser
Extends weapon range and removes damage falloff out to distance.
★ CombatSniping · stand-off
⚙ What it does

Flattens damage falloff so you hit for full at range. Essential for rail guns, plasma and any sniping playstyle.

★ Who it's for

Snipers and stand-off builds, rail/plasma gunboats, and PvE pilots who like to open early.

⚡ Experimental pick

Phasing Sequence (bypasses some shield) or Scramble Spectrum are the pulse-laser staples.

▶ Overcharged Pulse Laser
Pushes weapon damage hard at the cost of distributor draw and a smaller clip.
★ CombatMax DPS · RES / CZ
⚙ What it does

The damage-per-shot king. Biggest raw uplift of any weapon blueprint, paid for in distributor draw and clip size — counter the clip with Auto Loader.

★ Who it's for

The primary combat weapon blueprint — any RES/CZ gunboat or PvP build.

⚡ Experimental pick

Phasing Sequence (bypasses some shield) or Scramble Spectrum are the pulse-laser staples.

▶ Short Range Pulse Laser
Trades range for a large up-close damage boost.
★ CombatBrawling
⚙ What it does

Trades range for a big up-close damage boost. Brutal in a brawl, useless at distance.

★ Who it's for

In-your-face brawlers — fragment-cannon Cobras and shotgunning gunboats.

⚡ Experimental pick

Phasing Sequence (bypasses some shield) or Scramble Spectrum are the pulse-laser staples.

Rail Gun 5 blueprints
▶ High Capacity Magazine Rail Gun
Enlarges the magazine and ammo reserve for long engagements.
★ CombatLong engagements
⚙ What it does

A bigger magazine and ammo reserve for sustained engagements without reloading or rearming.

★ Who it's for

Massacre stacking and long RES sessions where ammo economy matters.

⚡ Experimental pick

Feedback Cascade (smashes enemy shield cells) or Super Penetrator are the rail-gun signatures, with Long Range.

▶ Long Range Rail Gun
Extends weapon range and removes damage falloff out to distance.
★ CombatSniping · stand-off
⚙ What it does

Flattens damage falloff so you hit for full at range. Essential for rail guns, plasma and any sniping playstyle.

★ Who it's for

Snipers and stand-off builds, rail/plasma gunboats, and PvE pilots who like to open early.

⚡ Experimental pick

Feedback Cascade (smashes enemy shield cells) or Super Penetrator are the rail-gun signatures, with Long Range.

▶ Sturdy Torpedo Pylon
Hardens the weapon against damage and adds armour piercing.
★ CombatDurable hardpoints
⚙ What it does

Hardens the weapon against damage and adds piercing — keeps hardpoints alive under return fire.

★ Who it's for

Durability-focused turret boats and long sieges.

⚡ Experimental pick

Torpedoes are single-purpose anti-large ordnance; experimentals are situational.

Sources

Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

EDCD coriolis-dataBlueprint definitions (blueprints.json) and experimental effects (specials.json); the per-roll material data — the authoritative Per Roll figures.coriolis-data/modifications/blueprints.json
EDEngineerExperimental-effect data and material-cost cross-checks; the indicative Avg Rolls / Total estimates.github.com/msarilar/EDEngineer
Inara — BlueprintsPer-blueprint pages: grades, modifiers, materials per grade, and which engineers offer each.inara.cz/elite/blueprints
Elite Dangerous Fandom WikiTechnical Blueprints reference — blueprint mechanics, grades, and experimental-effect descriptions.elite-dangerous.fandom.com/wiki/Technical_Blueprints
YouTube — Mile 13 GamingEnd-to-end engineering tutorial: blueprints, grades G1-G5, the materials each needs, and applying upgrades at engineers.youtube.com/watch?v=rpDnVdgqPhs
YouTube — Down to Earth AstronomyWalkthrough of which blueprints to pin at each engineer for remote-workbench use.youtube.com/watch?v=y5FqzeVRDAs
